store_headline: Bold Music WordPress Theme for Bands and Labels
store_subheadline: Launch a band or label site with discography, tour dates, video galleries, and a merch store built in.
features: Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Event listing and tour date functionality
Video gallery with custom player options
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Multiple blog layout options (grid, modern grid, mosaic, masonry, metro, standard, lateral)
Social sharing integration across multiple platforms
selling_points: Dark smoke textures and brush-script type that hit as hard as the music
The bold counterpart to Kayo's minimalism — for artists who want their site to command the room
Genre-flexible dark aesthetic for rock, EDM, hip-hop, and heavy acts without looking niche-specific
Full music feature set — discography, tours, video, audio, WooCommerce — in one dramatic package
The logical upgrade for bands moving from social-only to a headline-worthy website
WPBakery and Slider Revolution — maximum layout control without a developer
More visually dramatic than Decibel, more genre-flexible than Snakepit — Loud wins on stage presence
key_benefits: Visual impact that matches the intensity your audience expects from the music
Sell merch to fans drawn in by the dark poster aesthetic
Dark cinematic tour layouts make every gig feel like a headline slot
Smoke textures and brush-script amplify releases and videos — they don't compete
High-impact first impression that generic templates can never replicate
Label site that signals power and credibility on first load
design_features: Custom music player with playlist support

testimonials.text: I believe I was the first to buy this theme! I loved the way it looked and it's been a great transition into a new website for me. I find the layout easy to use and very seamless. The support has been fantastic and very efficient!
testimonials.author: repip

testimonials.text: A lot of options. Looks great. The support is superb. They answer fast and will help you till the problem is solved.
testimonials.author: JasperK88

testimonials.text: This theme is the only one I have ever used where all my customisations were point-and-click. A very, very comprehensive and thematically awesome theme. Thanks! 5/5 stars!
testimonials.author: TechTiger
